questions.question: Explain the concept of Belady's Anomaly and which algorithm exhibits this behavior.
keyPoints: Why it doesn't occur with other algorithms like LRU

questions.question: Compare and contrast FIFO, OPT, and LRU page replacement algorithms, discussing their implementation complexity, performance, and practical usability.
keyPoints: FIFO: simple implementation, poor performance, Belady's Anomaly
OPT: theoretical optimal, requires future knowledge, used as benchmark
LRU: good performance, complex implementation, approximates OPT
Practical considerations: Clock algorithm as LRU approximation
Use cases for each algorithm in real systems
